overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi game showing a character in a spacesuit exploring a dimly lit underground industrial mining facility. The character descends through metal stairwells and corridors into a large excavation hall with workers, heavy machinery, and vehicles.

segments.scene_description: The character descends a metal stairwell in a dimly lit industrial facility. Yellow and black warning stripes mark the platform edges as the character moves toward a narrow corridor entrance below.

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a vast industrial hall with a high ceiling and metal catwalks. The character approaches a worker using a mining laser on a large rock formation, with orange light illuminating the immediate area.

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the facility, the character passes the miner and enters a darker excavation area with dirt floors. Industrial pillars and hanging cables line the path as other workers in heavy suits become visible near heavy machinery.

illuminated interface panels on the wall

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a vehicle bay where industrial rovers are parked. A worker stands near one of the vehicles while control panels and equipment stations line the walls of this cleaner, organized section of the facility.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a cramped industrial stairwell into the expansive depths of a subterranean mining facility. It begins with a descent down metal stairs marked by yellow and black warning stripes, moving toward a narrow corridor entrance. As the camera emerges from the passage, the space opens into a vast industrial hall where orange light from a mining laser illuminates a worker carving into a large rock formation. The scene then shifts deeper into a darker excavation area characterized by dirt floors, industrial pillars, and hanging cables as other workers appear near heavy machinery. Finally, the path leads into a cleaner, organized vehicle bay where industrial rovers are parked alongside control panels and equipment stations.
